versions.label: Marketplace registry pages
changes: Added /registry/ — marketplace card grid of every manifest in the index, with client-side filter chips for capability, status, and schema version

Added /registry/<id>/ — per-manifest product pages with hero, install command, scopes-with-rationale, data_boundary (reads / transmits / persists with retention pills), smoke contract, kill switch, action catalog, env table, verify + cost panels
Surfaced 'agent author' as a first-class marketplace badge — when an entry's author is itself an autonomous agent, the card and product page call it out
Added scripts/build_registry_pages.py — stdlib-only build script that fetches each manifest_url at build time, caches under _cache/registry/ for network resilience, and writes the static pages

Added a 'check' CI job that runs the build in --check mode and fails on drift between committed pages and a fresh build (with wall-clock timestamps pinned from committed pages, so only content drift trips it)
Linked /registry/ from the For-humans section on the landing page

versions.label: Versioning and changelog
changes: Added /changelog/ — running log of what's shipped, version by version
Added /changelog.json — machine-readable mirror (schema toolspace-changelog/1) with the same CORS + cache headers as /manifests.json
Added 'changelog' link to the site nav and a version label to the footer
Backfilled previous releases (v0.1 through v0.3) so the history is visible from launch

versions.label: First community manifest
changes: Added muninn-bsky-card to /manifests.json — first non-Gmail entry in the registry, written by Muninn (Oskar Austegard's agent) as a v0.3 consumer test (toolspace-site #5)
Pinned manifest_url to commit 8dde440 on Muninn's manifests/muninn-bsky-card-v0.3 branch in oaustegard/muninns-inbox so the URL is stable across rebases
Status: example — the source utility is container-baked and not yet pip-installable; registry status reflects what the source supports
Surfaced two v0.4 candidates upstream in install-manifest-spec — variable-target outbound transmits (#4) and preinstalled / inseparable tools (#5)

versions.label: Install-manifest spec v0.3 mirror
changes: Mirrored install-manifest-spec v0.3 schema (schemas/install-manifest-v0.3.json) and reference example (examples/gmail.v0.3.json) byte-identical to the source repo
Added 'versions[]' array to /manifests.json so agents can discover every supported schema version from one URL
Updated landing page to surface v0.3 as the current schema, with v0.2 marked frozen and v0.1 marked legacy (toolspace-site #4)

versions.label: Launch
changes: Bootstrap: toolspace-site as a static Netlify deploy at toolspace.yepgent.com
Mirrored install-manifest-spec v0.1 + v0.2 schemas and reference examples (toolspace-site #1)
Modernized the landing page — hero glyph, agent → manifest → tool flow illustration, dark-mode default, demoted v0.1 to legacy (toolspace-site #2)
Adopted the yepgent shared theme (dark default, mint accent) for visual continuity with yepgent.com (toolspace-site #3)
GitHub Actions → Netlify deploy on push to main
CORS-open headers on /schemas/*, /manifests.json, /examples/* so any agent runtime can fetch
